title: youngia × intermedia
intro: Youngia × intermedia, also known as White Aster or Oriental False Hawk's Beard, is a hybrid plant of the Youngia genus, commonly found in mountainous regions of Asia. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which are attributed to its various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Youngia × intermedia include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Youngia × intermedia is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or dried flower, and is also used in traditional Asian medicine to promote digestion and relieve menstrual cramps.
